ironmarch-boots.name: Ironmarch Boots
ironmarch-boots.description: Armored boots built for punching through enemy lines without losing a single stride.

glyphstep-sandals.name: Glyphstep Sandals
glyphstep-sandals.description: Sandals traced with leylines that sharpen spell focus with each measured step forward.

shadowstep-boots.name: Shadowstep Boots
shadowstep-boots.description: Boots engineered for complete silence on stone, wood, and compacted earth alike.

pilgrim-greaves.name: Pilgrim's Greaves
pilgrim-greaves.description: Road-greaves worn thin by holy pilgrimage; sanctified enough to still turn blades.

swifttrack-boots.name: Swifttrack Boots
swifttrack-boots.description: Lightweight hunting boots for closing distance without making a sound or a stumble.

warbreaker-stompers.name: Warbreaker Stompers
warbreaker-stompers.description: Boots that turn a charge into a ground-shaking impact that leaves enemies bleeding.

spellthread-sandals.name: Spellthread Sandals
spellthread-sandals.description: Sandals threaded with living spellwork that sustains the caster through a long battle.

wraithstep-boots.name: Wraithstep Boots
wraithstep-boots.description: Boots of a wraith-dancer who leaves no footprints behind, only bleeding enemies.

sacred-treads.name: Sacred Treads
sacred-treads.description: Blessed treads that sanctify every step, protecting the faithful from those who pursue them.

windstrider-boots.name: Windstrider Boots
windstrider-boots.description: Boots that move with the wind and leave pursuing enemies gasping in slowed misery.

godstomper-boots.name: Godstomper Boots
godstomper-boots.description: Boots forged in a godwar, still carrying the crushing force of that final charge.

leyline-walkers.name: Leyline Walkers
leyline-walkers.description: Sandals that walk the leylines, drawing raw power from every step into open ground.

midnight-tread.name: Midnight Tread
midnight-tread.description: Born from shadow and malice; the wearer becomes the dark itself, utterly unstoppable.

heavenstrider-greaves.name: Heavenstrider Greaves
heavenstrider-greaves.description: Greaves touched by divine light; they carry the bearer forward through any storm.

stormstrider-boots.name: Stormstrider Boots
stormstrider-boots.description: Woven through with storm energy; the wearer covers ground at the speed of lightning.

leather-boots.name: Leather Boots
leather-boots.description: Sturdy walking boots. Nothing fancy, everything functional.

cloth-sandals.name: Cloth Sandals
cloth-sandals.description: Light sandals worn by apprentice mages for grounding exercises.

hide-treads.name: Hide Treads
hide-treads.description: Soft-soled treads that barely leave a footprint.

marching-boots.name: Marching Boots
marching-boots.description: Regulation infantry boots. Built to march, not to impress.

pilgrim-sandals.name: Pilgrim Sandals
pilgrim-sandals.description: Simple rope sandals worn on holy pilgrimages.

ironshod-boots.name: Ironshod Boots
ironshod-boots.description: Steel-toed boots that double as weapons in a brawl.

leywalkers.name: Leywalkers
leywalkers.description: Soft boots attuned to ley-line vibrations underfoot.

softpad-boots.name: Softpad Boots
softpad-boots.description: Padded soles for silent movement. A burglar essential.

temple-greaves.name: Temple Greaves
temple-greaves.description: Consecrated greaves worn by temple guardians on night watch.

trailrunner-boots.name: Trailrunner Boots
trailrunner-boots.description: Lightweight boots with reinforced ankles for rough terrain.

snowstrider-boots.name: Snowstrider Boots
snowstrider-boots.description: Boots lined with frozen hide. Move silently across ice and snow.

blizzard-treads.name: Blizzard Treads
blizzard-treads.description: Boots forged in the heart of a blizzard. The wind carries you forward.

lavawalker-boots.name: Lavawalker Boots
lavawalker-boots.description: Boots enchanted to walk on cooling lava. The soles never burn.

dimension-striders.name: Dimension Striders
dimension-striders.description: Boots that step between dimensions. The wearer flickers in and out of existence.
